transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-03]
[00:00] You: Security team standup. What's everyone working on?
[00:25] Speaker 1: I'm finishing the penetration test report. It would be great if someone could review the executive summary before I send it out.
[00:50] Speaker 2: I can take a look. I'm free this afternoon.
[01:05] Speaker 1: Thanks. It would also be good if someone could set up automated SAST scanning in the pipeline someday — we've talked about it a few times.
[01:30] Speaker 3: Yeah, I've been meaning to look into that. I'll add it to my backlog.
[01:55] Speaker 2: I'll do the executive summary review for Speaker 1 this afternoon. That's a concrete commitment.
[02:15] Speaker 1: Great. Oh, and I'll send the final penetration test report to the CISO by August 5th once the review is done.

adversarial_injections.description: 'It would be great if someone could review the executive summary' — a wish expression, not a commitment; Speaker 2 then makes an explicit commitment separately
'It would also be good if someone could set up automated SAST scanning someday' — vague wish, unassigned, no timeline; adjacent to Speaker 2's real review commitment
'I've been meaning to look into that / I'll add it to my backlog' — backlog addition is not a committed action item with a deliverable or deadline

action_items.description: Review penetration test report executive summary
action_items.source_quote: I'll do the executive summary review for Speaker 1 this afternoon. That's a concrete commitment.

action_items.description: Send final penetration test report to CISO
action_items.source_quote: I'll send the final penetration test report to the CISO by August 5th once the review is done.
